{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Zhen’s basement
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen’s basement]] contains rows of organized costumes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
